description:
Modern web radio player built with Tauri and React

Radioss is a modern, cross-platform web radio player application built with Tauri and React.
It provides a clean, intuitive interface for browsing and listening to internet radio stations.
See the assets to download this version and install.
What's Changed
- chore: changed base domain by @DasCanard in #53
- fix: ad-hoc identity macos by @DasCanard in #54
- fix: macos fix quit by @DasCanard in #55
- chore(deps): bump esbuild and vitest by @dependabot[bot] in #58
- chore(deps): bump vite and vitest by @dependabot[bot] in #57
- chore(deps): bump postcss from 8.5.3 to 8.5.14 by @dependabot[bot] in #56
Full Changelog: 0.9.4...0.9.5
